next_steps: Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, bacterial, fungal, and mycobacterial cultures and PCR
Serum cryptococcal antigen and histoplasma antigen testing
Initiate empiric corticosteroids for possible moderate-to-severe PJP
Blood cultures for bacteria, fungi, and mycobacteria
Immediate stabilization with supplemental oxygen and hemodynamic support

differential_diagnoses: Bacterial pneumonia (e.g., S. pneumoniae or S. aureus)
next_steps: Immediate stabilization with supplemental oxygen and hemodynamic support
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology, silver stain, and bacterial, fungal, and mycobacterial cultures
Serum and urine histoplasma antigen testing
Initiation of intravenous trimethoprim-sulfamethoxazole and systemic corticosteroids for suspected PJP
Blood cultures for bacteria, fungi, and mycobacteria
